name: Savant Sommelier
mission: Landscape, geology, agriculture, and terroir as ecology writing — occasional essays, not a product door.
portfolioNote: Savant Sommelier becomes occasional editorial on the regional dashboard — terroir as ecology, not a standalone tasting-room app.
learnToday: How slope, soil, and climate shape both forest communities and cultivated landscapes
Reading a landscape before reading a label — attention without pretension
Water, stewardship, and native habitat at the edge of working land
Why this content supports learning but does not warrant a separate product
comingSoon: Occasional research briefs and photo essays on the dashboard
Cross-links to geology and ecology lessons in ForageCast

preview.title: The tasting room overlook
preview.description: The glass can hold the landscape — as an essay, not an app. Useful ideas are preserved; public investment stays on the core platform.
